scripts.export:gh-pages: VITE_GITHUB_PAGES=1 npm run build -w @nutria/web && rm -rf ../docs && cp -R app/web/dist ../docs && touch ../docs/.nojekyll
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w app/server" "npm run dev -w app/web"
scripts.test: npm run test -w app/server && npm run test -w app/web
